name: Promissory Note (Personal Loan Agreement)
description: A formal agreement recording a loan between individuals, including repayment terms and interest.
content:
PROMISSORY NOTE

Date: {{formatDate agreement_date}}

FOR VALUE RECEIVED, the undersigned {{borrower_name}} ("Borrower"), residing at {{borrower_address}}, promises to pay to the order of {{lender_name}} ("Lender"), residing at {{lender_address}}, the principal sum of {{principal_amount}} ({{amount_in_words}}), subject to the terms and conditions set forth below.

1. LOAN DISBURSEMENT

The principal amount was / will be provided to the Borrower on {{formatDate disbursement_date}} via {{disbursement_method}}.

2. INTEREST

{{#if (eq apply_interest 'Yes')}}

The principal sum shall bear interest at the rate of {{interest_rate}}% per annum. Interest shall be calculated on the basis of {{interest_calculation}}.

{{else}}

This loan shall not bear any interest.

{{/if}}

3. REPAYMENT

The Borrower promises to repay the total amount owed {{#if (eq apply_interest 'Yes')}}(principal plus accrued interest){{/if}} no later than the final maturity date of {{formatDate final_due_date}}.

{{#if (eq installments 'Yes')}}

Repayment shall be made in installments according to the following schedule:

{{installment_plan}}
{{else}}

The loan shall be repaid in a single lump-sum payment.

{{/if}}

All payments shall be made via {{payment_method}}.

4. DEFAULT AND PENALTIES

If the Borrower fails to make any payment when due, the Lender may declare the entire remaining balance immediately due and payable. In the event of default, the outstanding balance shall accrue a default interest/penalty of {{default_penalty}} until paid in full. The Borrower agrees to pay all costs of collection, including reasonable attorney's fees.

5. GUARANTOR / CO-SIGNER

{{#if (eq has_guarantor 'Yes')}}

The undersigned {{guarantor_name}}, residing at {{guarantor_address}}, unconditionally guarantees the full and prompt payment of this Promissory Note. If the Borrower defaults, the Guarantor shall immediately pay the full outstanding balance.

{{else}}

This Promissory Note is unsecured and does not have a guarantor.

{{/if}}

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Borrower has executed this Promissory Note as of the date first written above.

BORROWER

Signature: _________________________

{{borrower_name}}

LENDER
(Acknowledgment of Terms)
Signature: _________________________

{{lender_name}}

{{#if (eq has_guarantor 'Yes')}}

GUARANTOR

Signature: _________________________

{{guarantor_name}}

{{/if}}

fields.name: installment_plan
fields.label: Installment Schedule
fields.placeholder:
1st Payment: Amount - Date
2nd Payment: Amount - Date

fields.name: default_penalty
fields.label: Default Interest / Penalty Fee
fields.placeholder: e.g., 5% late fee, 10% annual default rate
